name: Aya Gold & Silver Inc.
description: Aya Gold & Silver is a silver producer anchored in Morocco, operating the Zgounder silver mine, one of the world's few large-scale, high-grade primary silver operations. The company completed a major expansion of Zgounder in 2025 supported by a US$100 million EBRD project loan, and is guiding for 5.2 to 5.8 million silver ounces from Zgounder in 2026. Aya is also advancing the Boumadine polymetallic project in Morocco through feasibility study with 200,000 metres of drilling planned in 2026.
